__comment: Batch spec for _tools/gen-cutout.py. Each value is { prompt, dst, quality? }. Prompts intentionally avoid franchise names to dodge OpenAI content filters; describe visual genre, props, costume, action. Every prompt ends with the pure-matte-black isolation clause so rembg cleanly extracts the subject.

code-rain/agent.prompt: A stoic secret-service-style figure in a sharp charcoal-black suit, crisp white dress shirt, thin black tie, wearing mirrored wrap-around black sunglasses and a single coiled ear-piece cable along the collar. Three-quarter front pose, arms at sides, serious expression. Painterly oil painting style with rich brushwork and glossy highlights. Single isolated subject, completely centered on pure solid #000000 matte black background. No border, no frame, no decoration, no text, no logos, no watermark, no shadow on the background. Subject fills approximately 70% of the frame.

code-rain/phone.prompt: A retro late-1990s candybar cellphone, banana-shaped slim black plastic body with a tiny green-tinted LCD screen, T9 keypad, stubby antenna, small green call button. Slightly tilted three-quarter view, screen glowing faintly. Painterly oil painting style with rich brushwork and glossy highlights. Single isolated subject, completely centered on pure solid #000000 matte black background. No border, no frame, no decoration, no text, no logos, no watermark, no shadow on the background. Subject fills approximately 70% of the frame.
